headline: STT Q1 Deep Dive: Fee Revenue, Digital Innovation, and AI Transformation Propel Results
summary: Financial services giant State Street (NYSE:STT) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 15.6% year on year to $3.80 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.84 per share was 7.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
